name: blog-localize
description: > Deep cultural adaptation of translated blog posts. Run after blog-translate completes. Goes beyond translation to swap brand examples, adapt CTAs, substitute legal references, localize statistic sources where possible, and adjust formality (Sie/du, tu/vous, formal/informal). Built-in profiles for DACH, Francophone, Hispanic, and Japanese markets. Use when user says "localize blog", "blog localize", "cultural adaptation", "adapt for Germany", "lokalisieren", "localiser", "adaptar".
author: AgriciDaniel
